name: Subagent Permission Stalls
description: Background agents complete their file creation work but stall on git commit or gh commands because they lack Bash permissions. Work is done but not committed.
detection: Agent output contains 'need Bash permission' or 'could you grant' AND agent created files that aren't committed
action: Launch agents with mode: bypassPermissions. If not possible, parent must commit agent work after completion.
evidence: 2026-03-22: MOG plan agent created 3 files but couldn't commit
2026-03-22: Ideation agent fixed workflow + wrote test but couldn't create gh issues
2026-03-22: Translation agent created 4 files but couldn't commit
2026-03-21: Multiple agents stalled on git operations during mega session
resolution: Use bypassPermissions mode for subagents. Parent always commits after agent completion.
